positive: A striking, central depiction of a celestial woodland creature amongst glowing bioluminescent flora. The style is neo-traditional tattoo illustration mixed with cosmic watercolor, featuring thick, clean outlines and highly saturated, contrasting colors (deep sapphire blues, electric violets, mint green, gold accents). The composition must be perfectly centered and suitable for an apparel print, forming a vibrant, cohesive mural. Include swirling nebula patterns, geometric mandala elements, stylized crystalline foliage, and a dramatic glow effect. Intricate, high detail, vector graphic quality, maximalism, perfect symmetry.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, blurry, low detail, poor anatomy, distorted, messy, extra limbs, poorly rendered hands, cartoon, realistic photo, grain, out of focus
